title: Mixed Review
purpose: Daily gym page. Never introduces new atoms. Only draws from atoms already seen in their home modules.

modes.title: Before class review
modes.selectionRule: Only atoms previously seen at least once. Bias toward sentenceGuided/typeFull atoms from conjugation, core patterns, days/time/routine, descriptions, and conversation.

modes.title: Weakest 20
modes.selectionRule: Rank all eligible atoms by module-normalized difficulty score and pull the worst ones across modules.

modes.title: Production mix
modes.selectionRule: Only atoms that have already unlocked at least typeFragment or equivalent. Prefer typeFull and sentenceGuided stages.

normalizationRule: Difficulty must be normalized inside each module before cross-module comparison so slow full-sentence tasks do not always outrank simple noun cards.
